title: calophyllum horstii
intro: Calophyllum horstii, also known as the "tiger powder tree," is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum horstii include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and digestive issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being and immunity.
